seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Charles Spurgeon sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Revenge, lust, ambition, pride, and self-will are too often exalted as the gods of man's idolat…

frase_original: Revenge, lust, ambition, pride, and self-will are too often exalted as the gods of man's idolatry; while holiness, peace, contentment, and humility are viewed as unworthy of a serious thought.
